title: Imaged Ores
description: This mod adds new ores to your world whilst still trying to maintain a vanilla feel. (N ALPHA)
body:
# Imaged Ores
**What is Imaged Ores?**
Imaged Ores is a Minecraft mod designed to expand the game by adding new content that still feels faithful to the original vanilla style. The goal of the mod is to enhance gameplay with new items, gear, and features without straying too far from the core Minecraft experience.

## **Features (Alpha v1.0.0):**
**New Gear Sets:**
The mod introduces new armor and tools made from familiar and fan-favorite materials that weren’t previously usable for crafting, such as:

- Emerald Armor & Tools
  
- Amethyst Armor & Tools
  
- Sapphire Armor & Tools
  
- Ruby Armor & Tools

These new gear sets offer players more options for progression, exploration, and customization.

**Crimson Iron Ore (Beta):**
A brand new ore unique to this mod, Crimson Iron adds fresh crafting possibilities. Tools made from Crimson Iron are currently in beta testing and will continue to evolve in future updates.

**New Mob - The Archmage:**
As of version 1.0.0, the mod adds a new mob known as The Archmage. This enemy can be found in rare locations and provides a challenging fight for experienced players.

**Unique Drops:**
The Archmage has a chance to drop the Time Looped Steak, an infinite food item that never runs out a powerful reward for those who manage to defeat him. (he's like one tappable though)
You can also make apple pie, if you feel like it..

### Bonus Features and Community Info:
Some tools in the mod may grant players special buffs when held or used, giving certain ores unique gameplay benefits. Additionally, scythes have been introduced as a new weapon/tool type for specific materials, offering an alternative combat and farming experience. If you encounter any bugs or have suggestions for new features, feel free to contact me on Discord: ishaaqr. I'm also currently looking for texture artists to help improve and expand the visual side of the mod.

**Recommended to play with JEI.**
